positive: A geometric, stylized illustration of a wise owl perched on an antique crescent moon, surrounded by constellations and swirling nebula patterns. The owl's feathers should be rendered in clean, contrasting silhouettes of deep indigo and forest green against a gradient cosmic backdrop. Incorporate subtle celestial elements like scattered gold foil stardust and stylized geometric patterns (mandala or sacred geometry) framing the scene. Use a strong high-contrast, vintage engraving and celestial map aesthetic. Centered composition, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel.
negative: text, words, signature, logo, watermark, blur, artifact, grainy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, realism, photorealistic
